content: Create asset input mapper function to convert Portfolio.assets to AssetInput objects for the calculation engine
Create result mapper function to convert ScenarioHorizonResult to existing ScenarioResult model for backwards compatibility
Integrate ClimateRiskCalculationEngine into /api/analysis/run endpoint replacing legacy risk_engine
Test /api/analysis/run endpoint with curl to ensure it returns valid results
Run frontend smoke test - generate sample data, run analysis, view results
